name: Tailwind CSS v4 Tutorial
description: Build a complete, responsive hiking blog from scratch using Tailwind CSS v4 and Vite — utility-first styling, custom design tokens, responsive grid layouts, hover animations, and a dark mode toggle persisted via localStorage.

moduleNames.1: Project Setup + First Tailwind Classes + Nav + Hero
moduleNames.2: Content Sections + Grid Layouts + Hover Effects
moduleNames.3: Dark Mode + JS + About + Newsletter + Footer
